content: Phase 2: Install libraries (framer-motion, lucide-react, react-intersection-observer, fonts) + setup
Phase 2: Backend - models, content types, CRUD endpoints, auth, seed
Phase 2: Backend - Invocation (email signup) endpoint + subscribers
Phase 2: Frontend - design tokens (index.css), global layout, App.js routing
Phase 2: Frontend - AtmosphereLayer, ThresholdHero, Threshold homepage
Phase 2: Frontend - The Archive index + 4 immersive album rooms (distinct atmospheres)
Phase 2: Frontend - The Library (index + reader) with sacred reading UX
Phase 2: Frontend - The Symbols (constellation grid + symbol detail page)
Phase 2: Frontend - The Roadhouse (news/events/press bulletin board)
Phase 2: Frontend - The Observatory (visual art gallery)
Phase 2: Frontend - The Invocation form + confirmation state
Phase 2: Frontend - Admin panel (login + CRUD for all content types)
Phase 2: Seed initial content (4 albums, sample symbols, structural copy)
Phase 2: Verify build + smoke test + screenshot
